requirements.summary: Implement minimal Raya theme design system with soft cream background, emerald green primary, soft gold accent, clean typography, elegant layout, mobile responsive design, and smooth animations
acceptanceCriteria: Background color is #FAF9F6 throughout the application
Primary interactive elements use #0F5132 emerald green
Accent elements use #C6A75E soft gold
Typography uses clean modern sans-serif fonts
Layout is spacious with adequate whitespace
Application is fully responsive on mobile devices
Animations are smooth and subtle without flashy effects
Thin gold divider line appears under header

file_operations.description: Add global CSS custom properties for Raya theme colors (#FAF9F6 cream background, #0F5132 emerald green primary, #C6A75E soft gold accent). Configure base styles with clean sans-serif typography and smooth subtle animations. Ensure mobile-responsive base styles.

Extend Tailwind theme with custom Raya color palette (raya-cream: #FAF9F6, raya-green: #0F5132, raya-gold: #C6A75E). Configure animation utilities for smooth subtle transitions. Add responsive breakpoints if needed.

requirements.summary: Create top navigation bar with three tabs: 'Daftar Keluarga', 'Summary Raya', and 'Admin Dashboard' (admin only), with smooth fade transitions and thin gold divider line
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar displays three tabs horizontally
Tab labels are 'Daftar Keluarga', 'Summary Raya', and 'Admin Dashboard'
Admin Dashboard tab only visible when user is authenticated as admin
Clicking tabs triggers smooth fade transition between content sections
Thin gold line divider appears immediately below navigation bar

file_operations.description: Create Navigation component with three horizontal tabs: 'Daftar Keluarga', 'Summary Raya', and 'Admin Dashboard'. Use authorization component to conditionally render Admin Dashboard tab only when user has admin role (check via isCallerAdmin backend capability). Apply thin gold (#C6A75E) divider line below header. Implement tab switching with smooth fade transitions between content sections. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire Navigation component into App layout. Set up state management for active tab selection and content switching with fade transitions. Ensure cream background (#FAF9F6) is applied to root container.

requirements.summary: Build Daftar Keluarga tab with centered card layout (max width 600px) containing family registration form with required fields: Nama Keluarga, Makanan Yang Akan Dibawa, and Bilangan Ahli Hadir (dropdown 1-20)
acceptanceCriteria: Form card is centered on page with maximum width of 600px
Nama Keluarga field is a required text input
Makanan Yang Akan Dibawa field is a required text input
Bilangan Ahli Hadir is a required dropdown with options 1 through 20
All fields display required validation indicators

file_operations.description: Create DaftarKeluarga component with centered card layout (max-width: 600px). Build registration form with three required fields: 'Nama Keluarga' (text input), 'Makanan Yang Akan Dibawa' (text input), and 'Bilangan Ahli Hadir' (dropdown with options 1-20). Apply Raya theme styling with emerald green accents. Include validation indicators for required fields.

requirements.summary: Implement dynamic member name fields in Daftar Keluarga form that appear with smooth slide-down animation when Bilangan Ahli Hadir is selected, generating labeled text inputs with fade-in stagger animation (0.08s delay each) and all fields required
acceptanceCriteria: When user selects number in Bilangan Ahli Hadir dropdown, corresponding number of name input fields appear
Container animates with smooth slide-down motion
Each name field is labeled sequentially: 'Nama Ahli 1', 'Nama Ahli 2', etc.
Each field appears with fade-in animation staggered by 0.08 seconds
All dynamically generated name fields are required
Changing the number updates the displayed fields accordingly

file_operations.description: Add dynamic member name fields generation based on Bilangan Ahli Hadir selection. Implement smooth slide-down container animation when fields appear. Generate text inputs labeled 'Nama Ahli 1', 'Nama Ahli 2', etc. Apply fade-in stagger animation with 0.08s delay per field. Mark all dynamically generated fields as required. Handle field updates when dropdown value changes.

requirements.summary: Implement form submission in Daftar Keluarga that shows loading spinner on submit button, saves family data via backend, validates all required fields, and displays success message 'Data berjaya disimpan.' after successful save
acceptanceCriteria: Submit button displays loading spinner during submission
Form validates that all required fields are filled before submission
Family data is saved to backend family_raya table
Success message 'Data berjaya disimpan.' appears after successful save
Form resets after successful submission

file_operations.description: Create React Query mutation hook for adding family data via addFamily backend capability. Handle loading states, error handling, and cache invalidation after successful submission. Return mutation function and loading state for UI integration.

Wire useFamilyMutations hook into form submission handler. Show loading spinner on submit button during mutation. Validate all required fields before submission. Display success message 'Data berjaya disimpan.' after successful save. Reset form state after successful submission. Handle validation errors gracefully.

requirements.summary: Build Summary Raya tab with animated total attendees counter that counts up from 0 to total number of all ahli with 1 second duration
acceptanceCriteria: Counter displays prominently on Summary Raya tab
Animation starts from 0 and counts up to current total of all ahli
Animation duration is exactly 1 second
Counter updates when new families are added

file_operations.description: Create SummaryRaya component. Fetch total attendees count via getMemberCount backend capability. Implement animated counter that counts up from 0 to total with 1 second duration. Display counter prominently with Raya theme styling. Ensure counter re-animates when data updates.
Create reusable count-up animation hook. Accept target value and duration (1 second). Return current animated value. Use requestAnimationFrame or easing function for smooth count-up effect.

requirements.summary: Create statistic cards section in Summary Raya displaying: Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, and Keluarga Paling Ramai, with fade-in animation, slight hover lift effect, and soft shadow
acceptanceCriteria: Four statistic cards are displayed in Summary Raya
Cards show: Total Orang (total attendees), Total Keluarga (total families), Total Jenis Makanan (unique food types), Keluarga Paling Ramai (family with most members)
Cards animate in with fade-in effect on load
Cards have soft shadow styling
Cards lift slightly on hover interaction

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook to fetch summary statistics via getSummaryStats backend capability. Return totalAttendees, totalFamilies, totalFoodTypes, largestFamilyName, and largestFamilySize. Handle loading and error states.

Create reusable StatisticCard component accepting label and value props. Apply Raya theme with soft shadow, fade-in animation on mount, and slight lift effect on hover. Use emerald green and gold accents appropriately.

Add statistic cards section using StatisticCard component. Wire useSummaryStats hook data into four cards: Total Orang (totalAttendees), Total Keluarga (totalFamilies), Total Jenis Makanan (totalFoodTypes), and Keluarga Paling Ramai (largestFamilyName with largestFamilySize). Arrange cards in responsive grid layout.

requirements.summary: Create family cards layout in Summary Raya displaying each family with: Nama Keluarga, Total ahli, Makanan, and list of ahli names, with real-time updates
acceptanceCriteria: Each registered family displays as a card in Summary Raya
Card shows family name prominently
Card displays total number of members
Card shows food item being brought
Card lists all member names
Cards update automatically when new families register

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook to fetch all families via getFamilies backend capability. Configure auto-refetch to support real-time updates. Return families array with loading and error states.

Create FamilyCard component displaying family name prominently, total members count, food item (platter), and list of member names. Apply Raya theme styling with soft shadow and emerald green accents.

Add family cards section using useFamilies hook. Map over families array and render FamilyCard for each family. Apply responsive grid or list layout. Ensure real-time updates via React Query cache invalidation.

requirements.summary: Implement charts section in Summary Raya with pie chart showing food distribution and bar chart showing number of attendees per family, both with smooth fade-in animations
acceptanceCriteria: Pie chart visualizes distribution of food items across families
Bar chart displays number of attendees for each family
Both charts animate in with smooth fade effect
Charts are responsive and properly sized
Charts update when data changes

file_operations.description: Create React Query hook to fetch food breakdown data via getFoodBreakdown backend capability. Return array of food items with counts for pie chart visualization.

Create FoodPieChart component using recharts or similar charting library. Wire useFoodBreakdown hook data. Display pie chart showing distribution of food items across families. Apply fade-in animation on mount. Use Raya theme colors (emerald green and gold palette). Ensure responsive sizing.

Create FamilyBarChart component using recharts or similar charting library. Wire useFamilies hook data to generate bar chart showing number of attendees per family. Apply fade-in animation on mount. Use Raya theme colors. Ensure responsive sizing.
Add charts section with FoodPieChart and FamilyBarChart components. Arrange charts in responsive layout. Ensure charts update when underlying data changes via React Query refetch.

requirements.summary: Create secure admin authentication system with login page and protect admin routes so only authenticated admin users can access Admin Dashboard and perform admin operations
acceptanceCriteria: Admin login page with authentication form exists
Backend validates admin credentials securely
Admin Dashboard route is protected and only accessible when authenticated
Non-admin users cannot access admin-only features
Admin session persists appropriately
Logout functionality exists for admin users

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for user profile management: useGetCallerUserProfile (fetches via getCallerUserProfile), useSaveCallerUserProfile (mutation via saveCallerUserProfile). Use authorization component as specified in its usage instructions to prevent profile setup modal flash. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create React Query hook to check admin status via isCallerAdmin backend capability. Return boolean indicating if current user is admin. Use authorization component to handle authentication checks. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create LoginButton component following the authorization component's login example. Use useInternetIdentity hook for authentication flow. Handle login/logout, show appropriate button state (logging in, login, logout). Clear React Query cache on logout. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create ProfileSetup modal component that prompts user for name on first login when getCallerUserProfile returns null. Use useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation to save profile. Follow authorization component's pattern to prevent modal flash by checking if actor is ready and profile is fetched. Apply Raya theme styling. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire authentication flow into App. Use useInternetIdentity to check authentication state. Show ProfileSetup modal when user is authenticated but has no profile. Add LoginButton to app header. Ensure user must be logged in before showing application data as per authorization component usage rules. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Build Admin Dashboard with editable data table displaying all families, search and filter functionality by family name, delete confirmation modal, and reset database confirmation modal
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Dashboard displays table with all family records
Table rows are editable in place
Search input filters families by name in real-time
Delete button on each row opens confirmation modal before deletion
Reset database button opens confirmation modal before resetting all data
All modals have clear confirm/cancel options

file_operations.description: Create AdminDashboard component that only renders when user is admin (check via useAdminCheck hook). Fetch families via useFamilies hook. Display editable data table with all family records. Implement search input that filters families by name in real-time. Add delete button per row that opens confirmation modal. Add reset database button that opens confirmation modal. Use authorization component to guard admin-only access; show access denied message for non-admins. Apply Raya theme styling. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create reusable ConfirmationModal component accepting title, message, onConfirm, and onCancel props. Include clear confirm and cancel buttons. Apply Raya theme styling with emerald green for confirm and appropriate styling for cancel.

Add mutations for updateFamily (via updateFamily backend capability), deleteFamily (via deleteFamily backend capability), and resetFamilies (via resetFamilies backend capability). Include cache invalidation after successful mutations. Return mutation functions and loading states.

Wire delete and reset mutations from useFamilyMutations hook. Open ConfirmationModal before executing delete or reset operations. Handle loading states during mutations. Update table after successful operations via React Query cache invalidation.

requirements.summary: Create Excel export feature with 'Export Full Report' button that generates SAID_Raya_Trip_2026_Full_Report.xlsx containing three sheets: Raw Data, Summary, and Makanan Breakdown with proper formatting
acceptanceCriteria: Export Full Report button is visible in Admin Dashboard
Clicking button generates Excel file named SAID_Raya_Trip_2026_Full_Report.xlsx
Sheet 1 contains raw data with each family member as separate row showing family name, member name, and food
Sheet 2 contains summary statistics: total people, total families, total food types, family with most members
Sheet 3 contains food breakdown showing each unique food item and count of families bringing it
All sheets have clean formatting with proper column headers and data alignment
File downloads automatically to user's device

file_operations.description: Create Excel export utility using xlsx library. Implement function to generate SAID_Raya_Trip_2026_Full_Report.xlsx with three sheets: (1) 'Raw Data' with columns Nama Keluarga, Nama Ahli, Makanan (one row per member), (2) 'Summary' with Total Orang, Total Keluarga, Total Jenis Makanan, Keluarga Paling Ramai, (3) 'Makanan Breakdown' with Makanan and Bilangan Keluarga Membawa columns. Apply proper formatting and clean table layout. Trigger automatic file download.

Add 'Export Full Report' button to Admin Dashboard. Wire button click to excelExport utility function. Pass families data and summary statistics from hooks to export function. Show loading state during export generation. Apply Raya theme styling to button.

requirements.summary: Implement real-time data synchronization across all views so changes are reflected immediately without manual refresh
acceptanceCriteria: When new family is registered, Summary Raya updates automatically
When admin edits or deletes family, all views update immediately
Statistics and charts refresh automatically when data changes
No manual page refresh needed to see latest data

file_operations.description: Configure React Query with appropriate refetchInterval or refetchOnWindowFocus settings to support real-time data synchronization. Ensure cache invalidation triggers automatic refetch across all components using this hook.
Configure React Query with appropriate refetchInterval or refetchOnWindowFocus settings for summary statistics. Ensure statistics update automatically when underlying data changes.

Ensure all mutations (addFamily, updateFamily, deleteFamily, resetFamilies) invalidate relevant query keys after success. Invalidate 'families', 'summaryStats', and 'foodBreakdown' query keys to trigger automatic refetch across all views.
